allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process -Name '\\''Evalux.Api'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''dotnet.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*Evalux.Api*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 2; '\\''api stopped'\\''')

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='dotnet.exe' OR Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'Evalux|next|3000|7001' } | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,@{N='Cmd';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(140,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 49448,5152 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $left = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'Evalux|next dev' }; if \($left\) { "AUN VIVOS:"; $left | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine } else { "OK - procesos del frontend de Evalux terminados. Puerto 3000 libre." })

PowerShell($node = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=41172" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID 41172 cmd: " + \($node.CommandLine\); "---"; Stop-Process -Id 25796,41172 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400; foreach \($p in 3000,5001,7001\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { "$p -> STILL LISTENING \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "$p -> free" } })
